snapshotValues: Unmanaged vulnerability workflow needed policy, scanning authorization, remediation priorities, and verification.
Policy artifacts, stakeholder notes, seven Tenable scan exports, CVE mapping, and PowerShell remediation scripts.
Validated remediation reduced total findings from 32 to 4 and eliminated critical vulnerabilities.
cards.title: Vulnerability Management Program Implementation

snapshotValues: Selected Windows 11 STIG findings needed configuration changes and proof of failed, fixed, and passed states.
Mapped STIG IDs to PowerShell scripts, verification commands, and screenshot evidence folders.
Documented selected STIG remediations without claiming full compliance or production deployment.
cards.title: DISA STIG Remediation Project

snapshotValues: Password-spray-driven RDP access required endpoint pivots to identify account, host, execution, and exfiltration activity.
KQL across logon, process, registry, file, device, and network telemetry reconstructed the attack path.
Produced a defensible cyber-range investigation with reproducible queries and attempted exfiltration findings.
cards.title: Password Spray Threat Hunt: RDP Compromise Investigation

snapshotValues: Akira ransomware activity needed host scoping, timeline reconstruction, ATT&CK mapping, and detection-gap documentation.
MDE hunting tied ransom artifacts, AnyDesk access, tooling, Defender tampering, staging, and impact commands together.
Confirmed affected hosts, documented the IOC timeline, and identified concrete detection recommendations.
cards.title: The Buyer / Akira Ransomware Threat Hunt
